reviews.comment:
Super amables pero se hacen filas muy largas y hay gente que se queda pelotudeando en vez de avanzar y te cansa porque la gente que trabaja ahi no les dice nada. Y demora todo si estas con el horario justo mas hoy en dia.

(Translated by Google)
They're super friendly, but the lines are really long and some people just stand around goofing off instead of moving forward, which is annoying because the staff doesn't say anything to them. And everything takes forever if you're on time, especially these days.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLMnI2Z1VnEAE

reviews.comment:
Uno de los plateros que hatiende turno tarde es bastante confiansudo y atiende primero a los clientes que entran despues sin importarle quién hesta primero el de anteojitos nó.

(Translated by Google)
One of the silversmiths working the afternoon shift is quite overconfident and serves customers who come in later without caring who's there first, not the one with glasses.
